title: 501(c)(3) Tax-Exempt Status
description: Maintain IRS 501(c)(3) tax-exempt status with documented qualifying purposes.

title: Form 990 Annual Filing
description: File Form 990, 990-EZ, or 990-N annually with IRS.

title: Form 990 Public Disclosure
description: Make Form 990 publicly available for 3 most recent years.

title: Form 990-T Unrelated Business Income
description: File Form 990-T for unrelated business income exceeding $1,000.

title: Schedule B Donor Disclosure
description: Apply Schedule B donor reporting per IRS guidance with redactions for public versions.

title: Private Inurement Prohibition
description: Avoid private inurement to insiders per 501(c)(3) requirements.

title: Intermediate Sanctions Compliance
description: Avoid excess benefit transactions per IRS intermediate sanctions rules.

title: Lobbying Limitations
description: Limit lobbying activities per 501(h) election or substantial part test.

title: Political Activity Prohibition
description: Refrain from political campaign intervention per 501(c)(3) absolute prohibition.

title: Quid Pro Quo Disclosure
description: Provide quid pro quo disclosure for contributions over $75 with goods/services.

title: Substantiation Letters
description: Provide written acknowledgment for contributions of $250 or more.

title: Form 8283 Non-Cash Contributions
description: Provide Form 8283 acknowledgment for non-cash gifts over $500.

title: Form 8282 Donee Disposition
description: File Form 8282 when disposing of donated property within 3 years.

title: Private Foundation Excise Tax
description: Apply private foundation excise tax rules including 5% minimum distribution.

title: Donor-Advised Fund Rules
description: Apply DAF rules per IRS including prohibited distributions.

title: State Charitable Registration
description: Register as charitable organization in states where soliciting donations.

title: State Charitable Renewals
description: Renew state charitable registrations annually per state requirements.

title: State AG Annual Reports
description: File annual reports with state Attorneys General per state law.

title: GAAP for Nonprofits
description: Apply ASC 958 nonprofit accounting standards for financial statements.

title: Functional Expense Allocation
description: Report expenses by program, management, and fundraising per ASC 958-720.

title: Single Audit Act Compliance
description: Conduct Single Audit when expending $750K+ in federal awards.

title: OMB Uniform Guidance
description: Comply with OMB Uniform Guidance for federal grant management.

title: Indirect Cost Rate Negotiation
description: Negotiate indirect cost rate with cognizant federal agency.

title: Procurement Standards
description: Apply OMB procurement standards for federally funded purchases.

title: Subrecipient Monitoring
description: Monitor subrecipients per Uniform Guidance subrecipient requirements.

title: Lawful Basis for Donor Data
description: Document lawful basis for donor and beneficiary personal data processing.

title: DSAR Response Within One Month
description: Respond to data subject access requests within one month.

title: Right to Erasure for Donors
description: Honor right to erasure subject to legitimate retention for tax records.

title: Granular Marketing Consent
description: Obtain freely given specific consent for fundraising communications.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Cross-Border Transfer Safeguards
description: Use SCCs or adequacy decisions for personal data transfers outside EEA.

title: Data Protection by Design
description: Implement appropriate technical and organizational measures by design and default.

title: PECR Marketing Consent
description: Obtain consent before marketing electronic communications per ePrivacy.

title: TCPA Fundraising Outreach
description: Comply with TCPA before automated fundraising calls or SMS.

title: CAN-SPAM for Nonprofit Email
description: Comply with CAN-SPAM Act for transactional and relationship messages.

title: California Consumer Privacy
description: Honor CCPA rights for California donors and beneficiaries.

title: PCI-DSS for Donations
description: Apply PCI-DSS controls to nonprofit donation processing.

title: ADA Title III Accessibility
description: Meet ADA Title III accessibility for nonprofit programs and services.

title: WCAG 2.1 Level AA
description: Meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA accessibility for nonprofit websites.

title: Section 504 Accessibility
description: Apply Section 504 to programs receiving federal funding.

title: Title VI Civil Rights
description: Avoid discrimination in federally assisted programs per Title VI.

title: Title IX Sex Discrimination
description: Apply Title IX to federally assisted nonprofit education programs.

title: Age Discrimination Act
description: Avoid age discrimination in federally assisted programs.

title: Volunteer Protection Act
description: Apply Volunteer Protection Act limited liability for qualifying volunteers.

title: FLSA for Nonprofit Employees
description: Comply with FLSA minimum wage and overtime for nonprofit employees.

title: Volunteer vs Employee Classification
description: Properly classify volunteers vs. employees per DOL guidance.

title: FERPA for Educational Nonprofits
description: Apply FERPA to nonprofit education program student records.

title: HIPAA for Healthcare Nonprofits
description: Apply HIPAA Privacy and Security Rules to nonprofit health programs.

title: COPPA for Child-Serving Nonprofits
description: Obtain verifiable parental consent before collecting child personal info under 13.

title: AML for Charitable Organizations
description: Apply BSA AML controls to large cash donations and grants.

title: OFAC Donor Screening
description: Screen large donors and grant recipients against OFAC SDN list.

title: OFAC Charitable Guidance
description: Comply with OFAC charitable activities and counter-terrorism guidance.

title: FCPA for International Operations
description: Avoid corrupt payments in international charity operations.

title: USAID Partner Vetting
description: Comply with USAID Partner Vetting System for international assistance.

title: FARA Registration
description: Register under FARA when acting as agent of foreign principal.

title: Lobbying Disclosure Act
description: File quarterly LD-2 reports for federal lobbying activities above threshold.

title: Form LM-30 LMRDA Compliance
description: File Form LM-30 annual report for union officials per LMRDA.

title: Whistleblower Protection Policy
description: Maintain whistleblower protection policy per Sarbanes-Oxley protections.

title: Document Retention Policy
description: Maintain document retention policy per Sarbanes-Oxley Section 802.

title: Conflict of Interest Policy
description: Maintain conflict of interest policy with annual disclosure form.

title: Board Composition and Independence
description: Maintain independent board composition per IRS Form 990 governance.

title: Investment Policy Statement
description: Maintain board-approved investment policy statement per UPMIFA.

title: UPMIFA Endowment Standards
description: Apply Uniform Prudent Management of Institutional Funds Act for endowments.

title: FCRA for Volunteer Background Checks
description: Apply FCRA to volunteer and employee background checks.

title: Child Protection Policies
description: Maintain child protection policies and training for youth-serving programs.

title: Mandatory Reporting Requirements
description: Comply with state mandatory reporting laws for child abuse suspicions.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC for security.

title: Confidentiality Controls
description: Identify, classify, and protect confidential donor and beneficiary information.

title: Nonprofit ISMS
description: Establish ISMS for donor and beneficiary information systems.

title: Donor Data Encryption
description: Apply ISO 27001 cryptographic controls to donor PII at rest and in transit.

title: Charity Watchdog Standards
description: Maintain transparency per Charity Navigator, GuideStar, BBB Wise Giving.

title: Public Support Test
description: Maintain public support per IRS public charity tests (509(a)(1)/(2)).

title: Religious Organization Exemption
description: Apply religious organization Form 990 exemption per IRS.

title: Foreign Branch Reporting
description: Report foreign branches per IRS Form 5471 and Form 8865 where applicable.

title: Form 990-PF Private Foundation
description: File Form 990-PF for private foundations.

title: State Property Tax Exemption
description: Maintain state property tax exemption with documented charitable use.

title: State Sales Tax Exemption
description: Maintain state sales tax exemption certificates per state.

title: Employment Tax Compliance
description: Comply with employment tax filing including Form 941 and 940.

title: Workers' Compensation Coverage
description: Maintain workers' compensation coverage per state requirements.

title: E-Verify for Nonprofits
description: Use E-Verify where state law mandates for new hires.

title: D&O Liability Insurance
description: Maintain Directors and Officers liability insurance.

title: General Liability Insurance
description: Maintain general liability insurance with appropriate limits.

title: Nonprofit Cyber Insurance
description: Maintain cyber insurance covering donor data breach response.

title: Fundraiser Compensation Disclosure
description: Disclose professional fundraiser compensation per state law.

title: Charitable Bequest Documentation
description: Maintain documentation for charitable bequests per IRS requirements.

title: Charitable Trust Administration
description: Administer charitable trusts per state and federal trust law.

title: 501(c)(4) Social Welfare Rules
description: Apply 501(c)(4) rules for social welfare organizations.

title: 501(c)(6) Trade Association Rules
description: Apply 501(c)(6) rules for business leagues and trade associations.

title: Political Organization 527
description: Comply with 527 political organization rules where applicable.

title: Donated Service Recording
description: Record donated services meeting GAAP recognition criteria per ASC 958.

title: Gift Acceptance Policy
description: Maintain gift acceptance policy with screening criteria.

title: Conservation Easement Rules
description: Apply IRS conservation easement rules with required appraisal.

title: Charitable Solicitation Disclosure
description: Provide charitable solicitation disclosure per state law.

title: EU CSRD Reporting
description: Report sustainability per CSRD where applicable to nonprofit operations.

title: EU AI Act for Nonprofit AI
description: Apply EU AI Act transparency obligations for AI-driven fundraising and beneficiary scoring.

title: Nonprofit Business Continuity
description: Establish BCMS for nonprofit operations continuity per ISO 22301.

title: BBB Standards for Charity Accountability
description: Apply BBB Wise Giving Alliance Standards for Charity Accountability.

title: Independent Sector Principles
description: Apply Independent Sector Principles for Good Governance and Ethical Practice.

title: Form 1023 Exemption Application
description: File Form 1023 or 1023-EZ for IRS recognition of 501(c)(3) status.

title: Form 1024 for Other Exempt Orgs
description: File Form 1024 for IRS recognition of other 501(c) tax-exempt status.
